relevant_quote: Seríi possível que o sr. justification: The author implicitly criticizes the "Caixa de Conversão" project by connecting its likely approval with the negative performance of Brazilian bonds in London and the declining exchange rate. This concern over declining currency value aligns with the Orthodox view.
